places.name: Amber Fort
places.description: Majestic hilltop fort with intricate mirror work, stunning courtyards, and panoramic views of Maota Lake.

places.name: Hawa Mahal
places.description: Iconic pink sandstone palace with 953 small windows designed for royal women to observe street life.

places.name: Nahargarh Fort
places.description: Hilltop fort offering breathtaking sunset views over the city. Popular evening destination.

places.name: City Palace
places.description: Grand royal palace complex blending Rajasthani and Mughal architecture. Still partially a royal residence.

places.name: Jantar Mantar
places.description: UNESCO World Heritage astronomical observation site with the world's largest stone sundial.

places.name: Tapri Central
places.description: Rooftop cafe with stunning Nahargarh Fort views. Known for masala chai and light bites.

places.name: Bar Palladio
places.description: Opulent Italian restaurant set in a palatial tent with hand-painted blue interiors.

places.name: LMB (Laxmi Mishthan Bhandar)
places.description: Legendary vegetarian restaurant since 1727. Famous for ghewar, dal baati, and traditional Rajasthani thali.

places.name: Anokhi Museum of Hand Printing
places.description: Charming museum showcasing traditional block printing techniques. Includes live demonstrations.

places.name: Jal Mahal
places.description: Stunning water palace appearing to float in Man Sagar Lake. Best viewed from the lakeside promenade.

places.name: Johari Bazaar
places.description: Vibrant jewelry and gemstone market in the heart of the Pink City. Great for bangles and traditional crafts.

places.name: Albert Hall Museum
places.description: Oldest museum in Rajasthan housed in stunning Indo-Saracenic architecture. Egyptian mummy is a highlight.

places.name: Elefantastic
places.description: Ethical elephant sanctuary offering walking, feeding, and painting experiences with rescued elephants.

places.name: Patrika Gate
places.description: Grand colorful gate celebrating architecture of all Rajasthani regions. Instagram-famous entrance.

places.name: Panna Meena Ka Kund
places.description: Ancient stepwell with mesmerizing geometric zigzag staircase patterns. A hidden gem near Amber Fort.

places.name: Curious Life Coffee Roasters
places.description: Specialty coffee shop with single-origin beans roasted in-house. Minimalist aesthetic, great pour-over.

places.name: Bapu Bazaar
places.description: Bustling street market for textiles, mojari shoes, and souvenirs. Haggling expected and encouraged.

places.name: Chokhi Dhani
places.description: Rajasthani village-themed resort with folk performances, camel rides, traditional dinner, and cultural shows.

places.name: Statue Circle
places.description: Central roundabout with Sawai Jai Singh statue. Popular evening hangout with street food vendors.

places.name: Galtaji Temple
places.description: Ancient temple complex built into a narrow crevice in Aravalli hills. Natural spring water kunds and resident monkeys.

places.name: 1135 AD
places.description: Royal dining inside Amber Fort. Mughal and Rajasthani cuisine served in a restored palace hall.

places.name: Jaigarh Fort
places.description: Imposing military fort housing Jaivana, the world's largest cannon on wheels. Connected to Amber Fort.

places.name: Rawat Mishthan Bhandar
places.description: Iconic sweet shop famous for pyaaz kachori, widely considered the best in Jaipur.

places.name: Birla Mandir
places.description: Stunning white marble temple illuminated beautifully at night. Dedicated to Lord Vishnu and Goddess Lakshmi.

places.name: Gem & Jewellery Museum
places.description: Museum showcasing Jaipur's gem-cutting heritage with live demonstrations and rare specimens.

places.name: Samode Haveli
places.description: Heritage hotel with a stunning courtyard cafe. High tea with Rajasthani pastries in regal surroundings.

places.name: Sisodia Rani Garden
places.description: Terraced Mughal-style garden with fountains, murals depicting Krishna legends, and peacocks.

places.name: Nibs Cafe
places.description: Bean-to-bar chocolate cafe doubling as a co-working space. Known for their hot chocolate flights.

places.name: Raj Mandir Cinema
places.description: Legendary meringue-shaped art deco cinema. Watching a Bollywood film here is a cultural experience itself.

places.name: Amer Stepwell
places.description: Beautifully restored stepwell near Amber Fort, less crowded than Panna Meena. Great for photos.

places.name: Suvarna Mahal
places.description: Award-winning fine dining at Rambagh Palace. Gilded ceilings, Florentine frescoes, and Indo-European cuisine.

places.name: Pottery Workshop at Blue Pottery Art Centre
places.description: Hands-on workshop learning Jaipur's signature blue pottery technique. Take home your creation.

places.name: Masala Chowk
places.description: Open-air food court at Jawahar Circle featuring 21 stalls with street food from across Rajasthan.

places.name: Sanganer Textile Village
places.description: Village famous for hand-block printing and handmade paper. Visit workshops and buy directly from artisans.

places.name: Wind View Cafe
places.description: Rooftop cafe overlooking Hawa Mahal. Perfect for a chai break while watching the pink city bustle.
